title: Invite Notification Enhancement
excerpt:
Description
Currently in both Monday.com notifications and email notifications we receive the name of the person who is requesting to invite the team member, but there is no mention of the user who actually needs access.…

posts.author: taraverian (Tara ORourke)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently in both Monday.com notifications and email notifications we receive the name of the person who is requesting to invite the team member, but there is no mention of the user who actually needs access. Could you please look into enhancing this so that the name or email of the person needing access to Monday.com is included. This will allow us to more easily monitor access for new joiners and ensure we can revoke access when required.

What are you trying to achieve

we receive the name of the person who is requesting to invite the team member, but there is no mention of the user who actually needs access. Could you please look into enhancing this so that the name or email of the person needing access to Monday.com is included. This will allow us to more easily monitor access for new joiners and ensure we can revoke access when required.
